top_signals.title: Ship struck in Strait of Hormuz as oil supertankers turn back again
top_signals.summary: The unidentified cargo ship was hit on its side and sustained damage to the bridge while it was sailing to the southeast of Oman, U.K. Maritime Trade Operations said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Chinese Energy Firm Pushes Fresh Debt Revamp After Payment Delay
top_signals.summary: Huachen Energy Co. plans to present a proposal to restructure its bonds, including $627 million in dollar-denominated notes, to investors as early as August, according to people familiar with the matter, as the Chinese power producer makes a fresh bid to ease liquidity pressure.

top_signals.title: Three youths jailed over fatal assault of college student in Hokkaido
top_signals.summary: The case involved a 20-year-old student being beaten to death by six people in a park in 2024.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
